title: Protocol Buffers (Protobuf) Wire-Format
description: Analyze Varints, Tag-Length-Value encoding, and field numbering within Protobuf's wire format. Evaluate the binary efficiency and schema evolution capabilities of Protobuf's wire format.
objectives: Analyze Varints, Tag-Length-Value encoding, and field numbering within Protobuf's wire format.
Evaluate the binary efficiency and schema evolution capabilities of Protobuf's wire format.
